summary: Classified all five open PR inventory items independently. No canonical was selected, no duplicate or low-signal closure is supported by the hydrated artifact, and no security-sensitive item was detected.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR with no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical; keep it independent for normal maintainer review.
Large active feature/bug-fix PR with author follow-up status and failing checks; it is not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate in this inventory shard.
Independent open PR with nontrivial product and compatibility scope; keep it for maintainer/proof review rather than treating it as cluster cleanup.
Small independent PR with maintainer approval but an unresolved proof gate; no close-style action is permitted or supported.
Useful independent fix PR with an unhydrated linked issue; keep it in normal review flow and do not emit fixed-by-candidate closeout from this inventory shard.
